events.title: The Early November and Hellogoodbye
events.description: Emo and pop-rock concert featuring The Early November and Hellogoodbye. 21+ event.

events.title: Seattle Symphony - Peanuts 75th Anniversary Symphonic Concert
events.description: Join Charlie Brown, Snoopy, and the Peanuts gang for a one-of-a-kind symphonic experience celebrating the 75th anniversary of Peanuts. Features the legendary music of composer Vince Guaraldi with projected animations and live onstage actors.

events.title: Comic Resistance Agency Pizzeria Mic
events.description: Comedy open mic night featuring local comedians.

events.title: Seattle Moisture Festival
events.description: A variety arts festival featuring comedy, music, and performance acts. Running March 19 - April 12.

events.title: Young Dragon: A Bruce Lee Story
events.description: A stage production exploring the early life of Bruce Lee through storytelling and movement.

events.title: Fellow Travelers
events.description: A contemporary opera exploring identity and politics through a powerful score and intimate staging.

events.title: Candlelight: Coldplay & Imagine Dragons
events.description: A string quartet tribute to Coldplay and Imagine Dragons performed in the glittering light of thousands of LED candles.

events.title: Candlelight: Tribute to Drake
events.description: A string quartet tribute to Drake performed in an illuminated atmosphere with thousands of LED candles.

note: Events compiled from Seattle Theatre, Seattle Symphony, Ticketmaster, and local event listings. Times and availability subject to change.
